Instance Property# unit

iOS 17.0+iPadOS 17.0+Mac CatalystmacOS 14.0+tvOS 17.0+visionOSwatchOS 10.0+

```
final var unit: IntentParameter<Value>.Acceleration? { get }
```

Available when `Value` conforms to `_IntentValue`, `Value` conforms to `Sendable`, and `Value.ValueType` is `Measurement<UnitAcceleration>`.## [See Also](/documentation/appintents/intentparameter/unit-4kgwq#see-also)
